scripts.test: bun run test:fast && bun run test:runtime
scripts.test:runtime: bun run test:runtime:core && bun run test:runtime:cli-a && bun run test:runtime:cli-b && bun run test:runtime:cli-c
scripts.test:runtime:cli-a: COOLIE_TEST_TRACK=runtime vitest run packages/cli/test/cli-e2e.test.ts -t 'auto-spawns|lists and adopts|relative path|api schema|unknown command|server stop|events tail|create accepts|pin and unpin'
scripts.test:runtime:cli-b: COOLIE_TEST_TRACK=runtime vitest run packages/cli/test/cli-e2e.test.ts -t 'creates, lists and deletes|creates each instance|rejects unknown engines'
scripts.test:runtime:cli-c: COOLIE_TEST_TRACK=runtime vitest run packages/cli/test/cli-e2e.test.ts -t 'create makes --agents|reports partial failure|resume'
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/protocol packages/server packages/cli && tsc --noEmit -p packages/client
scripts.postinstall: find node_modules -path '*node-pty*' -name spawn-helper -exec chmod +x {} + 2>/dev/null || true; bun scripts/patch-wdio-native-utils.ts
